entities.name: Canary trap
entities.context: Technique to identify information leaks by planting unique traceable markers

entities.name: Van Halen
entities.context: Rock band known for using contract riders as verification technique

entities.name: Green M&Ms rider
entities.context: Contract clause requiring removal of green M&Ms to verify promoters read full rider

entities.context: Nickname for Coleen Rooney who used fingerprinted posts to identify Instagram leaker

entities.name: Fingerprinted Instagram posts
entities.context: Technique of posting unique content to different followers to trace leaks

entities.name: Pre-release watermarking
entities.context: Technique using subtle word choice variations in distributed copies to identify leak sources

entities.name: Fake sentences in docs
entities.context: Product management technique of inserting traceable false content to identify document leaks
